minimum_stronger_source_pattern: provider/deployer incident report or formal vendor bulletin keyed to the exact CVE; deployment-context incident report or architectural postmortem; transaction-specific technical audit or formal consumer/securities disposition
figure_or_dashboard_use: Route-pressure bar chart; security-to-governance edge list; thesis chapter on evidence-layer asymmetry
interpretation: Largest seeded-pressure bucket. Good for bounded claims about where governance relevance is visible but incident-context authority is still too thin for stronger legal characterization.

minimum_stronger_source_pattern: court complaint/decree or regulator notice text; police/court/platform authority source; forensics/contract record tying the public event to a legal process; institutional correction notice from a second document-grade family
figure_or_dashboard_use: Legal uncertainty matrix; review-frontier panel; reviewer-response note on document-grade blockers
interpretation: Second-largest seeded-pressure bucket. The problem here is not category absence but missing document-grade authority that would narrow actor role, legal basis, or process status.

minimum_stronger_source_pattern: procurement file or register entry; DPIA/FRIA-equivalent or project specification; official deployment statement; technical audit or official correction outside regulated-finance enforcement
figure_or_dashboard_use: Map-ready country/authority evidence-gap matrix; public-sector disclosure comparison; procurement-verifiability panel
interpretation: Equal to the document-grade route in seeded-case pressure, but the main blocker is operational public-authority paperwork rather than abstract framework fit.

minimum_stronger_source_pattern: official institutional response, underlying administrative record, or additional direct-source capture for unresolved leads
interpretation: Small but reviewer-visible route: direct-source recovery can improve interpretation discipline without claiming legal closure.

minimum_stronger_source_pattern: official safety notice, clinical guidance, court/regulator record, or provider documentation with intended-use detail
figure_or_dashboard_use: Zero-seed caution panel; health-law limitations box
interpretation: Zero-seed placeholder retained intentionally so parallel health-law regimes stay visible in the atlas instead of disappearing from the legal matrix.

minimum_stronger_source_pattern: taxonomy review memo plus a stronger authoritative source package for the first residual case admitted to the matrix
interpretation: Residual mismatch is itself evidence. This row should remain a visible limit on forced classification until a first authoritative residual package exists.
